# Messaging & Observability

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| Kafka | Intermediate | ⬜ Pending |
| Prometheus & AlertManager | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Grafana | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| New Relic APM | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| ELK Stack | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Polarion ALM | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- Observability stack architecture (metrics, logs, traces)
- Prometheus service discovery, recording rules, and alerting
- Grafana dashboarding for CI/CT metrics and release stability
- ELK Stack for centralized log aggregation and analysis
- New Relic APM for application performance monitoring
- SLI/SLO definition for pipeline reliability
- Centralized alerting and incident response workflows
